description_long: This object consists of three partially melted candles, two of which are free-standing and one mounted on an ornate, round metal chamberstick holder with a curved handle. The candles are made of off-white wax, each with a visible flame and some blackened wicks. The wax on all candles is irregular and dripped, with pronounced melted edges and pooled bases, suggesting extended use. The metal holder has a classic, slightly tarnished brass appearance, with a wide base for stability and a looped handle for carrying. The overall look is rustic and antique, evoking a sense of old-world charm suitable for atmospheric urban settings such as historic streets, outdoor cafes, or park benches. The candles are arranged closely together, making them a decorative accent for intimate or vintage-themed urban environments.
description: A trio of melted, off-white candles—two free-standing and one on a brass chamberstick holder—each with a visible flame and wax drips, exuding a rustic, antique charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candles, with the largest candle on a brass holder and two smaller, melted candles in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the main candle on the holder and the proximity of the two smaller candles.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the curved handle of the brass holder and the arrangement of the candles.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the brass holder and the melted wax details on all three candles.
